text.title: cog-walk-process Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for cog-walk-process as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Action-sequence drift: agents like to "improve" the sequence mid-walk.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pin it as immutable input in every prompt. Sequence changes invalidate all per-step comparisons across evaluators.

failure-mode.description: Severity calibration is biased: agents over-mark Medium.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Constrain to a fixed distribution (e.g., max 20% High, 50% Medium, 30% Low).

failure-mode.description: Q4 (progress) requires the post-action screen. Capture both before+after; static-only walks systematically miss missing-feedback issues.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Single screenshots cannot show UI state changes or presence/absence of feedback indicators.
